name: mol-migration-module
description: 3-step pipeline for migrating a single module: spec-extract, implement, test-verify.

variables.name: module_name
variables.description: Name of the module being processed (kebab-case)

variables.name: module_group
variables.description: Group/directory for the module (e.g., auth, camera, settings)

variables.name: slice_type
variables.description: Slice type: vertical (user-facing feature) or horizontal (shared infrastructure)

variables.name: legacy_files
variables.description: Comma-separated list of legacy source files for this module

variables.name: source_files
variables.description: Comma-separated list of already-migrated source files (empty if todo)

variables.name: test_files
variables.description: Comma-separated list of existing test files

steps.name: spec-extract
steps.title: {{module_name}}: Spec Extract
steps.description_template: Study all source and test files for module {{module_name}} (group: {{module_group}}, slice: {{slice_type}}, status: {{module_status}}). Legacy files: {{legacy_files}}. Existing new files: {{source_files}}. Existing tests: {{test_files}}. Use the spec-extract skill. Output: specs/{{module_group}}/{{module_name}}.md

steps.name: implement
steps.title: {{module_name}}: Implement
steps.description_template: Implement module {{module_name}} ({{slice_type}}) in the target architecture. Read specs/{{module_group}}/{{module_name}}.md for behavior and functionality specs. Follow citations to study original implementation. Status: {{module_status}} — if partial, only build missing pieces. Use the migration-implement skill. Run unit tests (XCTest) after implementation.

steps.name: test-verify
steps.title: {{module_name}}: Test & Verify
steps.description_template: Write XCUITest for module {{module_name}} based on behavioral specs in specs/{{module_group}}/{{module_name}}.md. Run tests, debug failures (max 2 retries). Use the xcuitest-verify skill. Produce results to e2e/output/{{module_name}}/results.yaml.
